title: Stupid TNTRain
description: The StupidTNTRain plugin adds an element of fun to your Minecraft server. With this plugin, you can create hilarious moments by making TNT rain from the sky, accompanied by amusing facts displayed on the falling TNT entities.
body:
The **StupidTNTRain** plugin adds an element of fun to your Minecraft server. With this plugin, you can create hilarious moments by making TNT rain from the sky, accompanied by amusing facts displayed on the falling TNT entities.

**Some features:**
- Spawn falling TNT: Use the "/tntfallstart <Seconds>" command to start the game.

- Messages: Each falling TNT carries a stupid message, there are not many messages right now.

- Stop the TNT fall: Stop the chaotic TNT shower with the "/tntfallstop" command.

***Hope you will like this plugin!***
